name: devsecops-agency
description: A fully autonomous AI software-development company in a plugin. You speak only to the CEO; the CEO holds board meetings with 9 Chiefs, each of whom runs a council of specialists. Research → Product → Architecture → Security → Execution → Quality → DevOps → Docs → Legal. Security-first (STRIDE + OWASP Top 10) by default. Ships to GitHub. v0.2.1 adds durable cross-project memory (three-tier Light/Deep/REM dreaming, ported from openclaw) and per-agent append-only JSONL session logs replayable with rg + jq. v0.2.2 adds a scoped AGENTS.md hierarchy (root + agents/ + skills/ + 9 councils) and a deterministic-ordering rule so every Chief reads its own Must / Must not / Gate heuristic before dispatch. v0.2.3 adds a formal gates skill (green/yellow/red/n/a with blocking-vs-informing councils and waiver semantics) and a taskflow skill with a six-state machine and a hard 2-attempt fix-loop cap — so the agency converges or escalates instead of thrashing. v0.2.4 adds a worktree skill: parallel dispatches and every fix-loop run in isolated <slug>/_worktrees/<chief>-<attempt>/ scratch directories with declared writes[]/reads[], atomic scope-checked alphabetical merge, stale-rebase detection, and structural-vs-non-structural conflict handling. A live command-center artifact shows the org chart, every meeting, every handoff, and any blocker parked for you.
